assignments.name: mensagem

parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,
        7 AS dias
),

periodos AS (

    SELECT
        'atual' AS periodo,
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias - 1 DAY) AS inicio,
        data_fim AS fim
    FROM parametros

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior',
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL (dias * 2) - 1 DAY),
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias DAY)
    FROM parametros

)

SELECT

    p.periodo,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%DISTRIBUICAO%' THEN 'DISTRIBUICAO'
        ELSE 'OUTROS'
    END AS campanha,

    p.inicio,
    p.fim,

    ROUND(SUM(a.spend),2) AS investimento,

    SUM(a.impressions) AS impressoes,

    SUM(a.reach) AS alcance,

    SUM(a.clicks_all) AS clicks_all,

    SUM(a.link_click) AS cliques,

    SUM(a.landing_page_view) AS visitas_pagina,

    SUM(a.initiate_checkout_all) AS checkouts,

    SUM(a.purchase_all) AS vendas_trafego,

    SUM(a.purchase_value) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.link_click) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.landing_page_view) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.initiate_checkout_all) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.landing_page_view),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.purchase_all) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.initiate_checkout_all),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.spend) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.purchase_all),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.purchase_value) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.spend),0),
        2
    ) AS roas,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.spend) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
        2
    ) AS cpc

FROM periodos p

JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
    ON DATE(a.Data) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim
  
GROUP BY

    p.periodo,

    campanha,

    p.inicio,

    p.fim

ORDER BY

    campanha,

    FIELD(p.periodo,'atual','anterior');

assignments.name: mensagem

parameters.query:
SELECT
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data,

    ROUND(SUM(`spend`),0) AS investimento,
    SUM(`impressions`) AS impressoes,
    SUM(`link_click`) AS cliques,
    SUM(`clicks_all`) AS clicks_all,
    SUM(`landing_page_view`) AS visitas_pagina,
    SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) AS checkouts,
    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`landing_page_view`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`purchase_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`spend`) / NULLIF(SUM(`purchase_all`),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`purchase_value`) / NULLIF(SUM(`spend`),0),
        2
    ) AS roas

FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }}

WHERE `campaign_name` LIKE '%{{ $json.campaign_name }}%';

SELECT
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(campaign_name, ']', 1), '[', -1) AS campaign_name,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data
FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }}
WHERE campaign_name LIKE '%CAPTURA%'
  AND spend > 0
  AND `Data` >= '{{ $now.minus($json.dias, "days").format("yyyy-MM-dd") }}'
GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(campaign_name, ']', 1), '[', -1);

GROUP BY

    p.periodo,

    campanha,

    p.inicio,

    p.fim

ORDER BY

    campanha,

    FIELD(p.periodo,'atual','anterior');
